content.text: Hisar HAU UG / PG Admission 2026 : Get complete details about Hisar HAU UG / PG Admission 2026, including admission updates, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, result, and more.

rows.text: Chaudhary Charan Singh Haryana Agriculture University, Hisar (HR) Hisar HAU UG & PG Courses Admission 2026-27 Short Details of Admission Notification

Notification Out : 23/05/2026 Starting Date : 23/05/2026 Last Date : 15/06/2026 11:59 PM Fees Last Date : 16/06/2026 05 PM Correction Date : 11-16 June 2026 Display Candidates List : 17/06/2026 Entrance Exam Date : 05, 19, 25 July 2026 (Course Wise- Check ) Counselling Schedule : Check Here
General : 1500/- SC / BC / EWS : 375/- PH (Divyang) : 375/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : Min. 14 Years, as on 31/08/2026 Course Duration : 2+4 Years Eligibility : 10th Class Passed with (60% Marks for General / BC Category), (57% Marks for SC / PH Category).

Age Limit : Min. 16 Years, as on 31/08/2026 Course Duration : 04 Years Eligibility : 12th Passed with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics / Biology or Agriculture Stream with (50% Marks for General / BC Category), (47.5% Marks for SC / PH Category).

B.Tech (Agri. Engg. / Agri. Engg. LEET) Course
The admission will be made through the Haryana State Counselling Society on the Basis of Merit of Joint Entrance Exam (Mains) 2026 and LEET 2026.
M.SC. / M.Tech. / M.F.Sc & Ph.D Course Details
Eligibility : Graduation Degree in Related Field with (55% Marks for Gen / BC Category), (52.25% Marks for SC / PH Category). Check Course Wise More Qualification Details.
